# Project Guidelines

## Overview

This is the **GitHub profile repository** for [@professorjoaomiguel](https://github.com/professorjoaomiguel).
The only file that matters is `README.md` — its content renders directly on the public GitHub profile page.

## Purpose

- Showcase the profile owner's bio, interests, and contact information.
- Content is written in GitHub-flavored Markdown (GFM).
- Supports HTML comments (`<!-- -->`) for hidden notes.

## Conventions

- Keep the README concise and friendly — it's a public-facing introduction.
- Use GitHub-flavored Markdown features: emoji shortcodes (`:wave:`), badges, shields, and relative links are all supported.
- Contact: Telegram [@professorjoaomiguel](http://t.me/professorjoaomiguel).
- Commented-out sections (interests, learning, collaboration) are placeholders — uncomment and fill in when ready.

## What to Avoid

- Do not add build scripts, CI workflows, or code files — this repo is documentation-only.
- Do not duplicate the README content in other files.
